calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Sauceda.
Maureen McGowan, Esq. for Petitioner: Fredna Gulley, present as Guardian at litem for: Jahkeem Stokes Gulley, Jahkeisha Stockes Gulley,Kaheem Stokes Gulley, Mashai Stokes Gulley, Raheem Stokes Gulley and Taniesha Stokes Gulley, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved as follows:
Attorney's Fees $9,682.91
Costs $33.95
A net balance of $29,048.72 for each minor, to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 1702 Tennessee St., Vallejo, CA. 94590, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
